caption: A man with a shaved head and a full beard is recording in a studio against a dark, vertically ribbed sound-absorbing wall. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a small logo that reads "Authentic" with additional smaller text below it. A professional microphone on a shock mount is positioned in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man is seen from the chest up, looking toward the right of the frame. He raises his right hand to his forehead, resting his fingers near his hairline in a thoughtful or stressed gesture. His expression shifts slightly as his mouth opens and closes, as if he is speaking or reacting to something. His right arm, which is visible, is decorated with several tattoos. The camera angle and the background remain static as he moves slightly.
